                (

                    "MVIEW",
                ),
                (
                    Sink,

                    "STREAM_SCAN",

                    "BARRIER_RECV",
                ),
                (

                    "VALUES",
                ),
                (
                    Dml,
                    128,
                    "DML",
                ),
                (
                    CdcFilter,
                    256,
                    "CDC_FILTER",
                ),
                (
                    Skipped1,
                    512,
                    "SKIPPED1",
                ),
                (
                    SourceScan,
                    1024,
                    "SOURCE_SCAN",
                ),
                (
                    SnapshotBackfillStreamScan,
                    2048,
                    "SNAPSHOT_BACKFILL_STREAM_SCAN",
                ),
                (
                    FsFetch,
                    4096,
                    "FS_FETCH",
                ),
                (
                    CrossDbSnapshotBackfillStreamScan,
                    8192,
                    "CROSS_DB_SNAPSHOT_BACKFILL_STREAM_SCAN",
                ),

                ),
                (

                    65536,

                (

        "#]].assert_debug_eq

                r#"
            [storage.object_store]
            object_store_set_atomic_write_dir = true

            [storage.object_store.s3]
            object_store_keepalive_ms = 1
            object_store_send_buffer_size = 1
            object_store_recv_buffer_size = 1
            object_store_nodelay = false

            [storage.object_store.s3.developer]
            object_store_retry_unknown_service_error = true
            object_store_retryable_service_error_codes = ['dummy']


            "#,
            ).unwrap
